# Sagewai Documentation

> Technical documentation for the Sagewai AI agent infrastructure platform.

## Getting Started

- Quickstart: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/getting-started
- First Agent Tutorial: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/first-agent
- Tutorials: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/tutorials

## Core Concepts

- Agents: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/agents
- Memory: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/memory
- Guardrails: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/guardrails
- Strategies: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/strategies
- Workflows: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/workflows
- Directives: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/directives
- Safety: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/core-concepts/safety

## API Reference

- Python SDK: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/api-reference/python-sdk
- REST API: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/api-reference/rest-api
- Agents API: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/api-reference/agents
- Tools API: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/api-reference/tools
- Memory API: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/api-reference/memory
- MCP Server: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/api-reference/mcp

## Guides

- Self-Hosted Deployment: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/self-hosted
- Admin Panel: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/admin-panel
- Fleet Architecture: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/fleet-architecture
- Client Wrappers (17 languages): https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/client-wrappers
- Local Inference (Ollama, vLLM): https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/local-inference
- Cost Management: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/cost-management
- PII Protection: https://docs.sagewai.ai/docs/guides/pii-protection

## Links

- Website: https://sagewai.ai
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/sagewai/
- Contact: hello@sagewai.ai
